name: 𝓣𝓻𝓪𝓷𝓼𝓯𝓸𝓻𝓶𝓪𝓽𝓲𝓸𝓷 𝓓𝓾𝓷𝓰𝓮𝓸𝓷
description:
Version 1.3 (Inanimate Transformation Added)

You find yourself waking up in a dungeon, will you get out or succumb to the various traps, and become of the the inhabitants of the dungeon.

When creating your character, with species if it is a anthropomorphic animal, please end it with for example; if a wolf "furry" then Wolf morph.

Constructive criticism is encouraged, so if you don't mind please leave truthful reviews.

Warning: transformation fetishes. (BE WARNED!)
creator: Alice_steele
